title: Generating a Recursive Algorithm for a Binary Search Tree
scenario: Craft a prompt that will instruct an LLM to produce a recursive algorithm written in Python that traverses a binary search tree, including functions for inserting nodes, searching for a specific value, and printing the tree in-order, pre-order, and post-order. Ensure the LLM output is under 100 lines of code and follows standard coding practices.
constraints: Must be under 100 lines of code
Must use recursion for tree traversal

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the generated recursive algorithm accurately represents the binary search tree operations, including insertion, search, and traversal.
Check if the generated recursive algorithm meets the constraints provided, including line count and recursion usage.
Evaluate the clarity and concision of the generated recursive algorithm, ensuring it follows standard coding practices.
